Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}How many times do I have to explain it? It's like I'm talking to a moron.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1001}Why would you even accuse me!? The cigarette butt was in the boys' bathroom, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Then can you prove it wasn't a girl who brought it and left it there?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1002}With that logic, this is never gonna end![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1002}I'm done with this. You're on your own.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 5 13 5 15 102}Try not to hold it against them. They think like children—they just can't help it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Sooner or later, they'll see the light. Then I'll earn their trust, and they'll learn to respect me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}I hope you're not just giving into peer pressure, {f 4 1}-kun.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Don't you see? A well-oiled machine is only as strong as its weakest cog![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}I don't mean to isolate myself. I'm just remaining detached. Someone always gets hurt in any relationship sooner or later.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}...I suppose I've gone on long enough. I apologize.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like I understand[n]him a little better now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}No point in having a meeting today if no one else is here. Let's go.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I parted ways with Odagiri[n]and went back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
